card_description: Christopher is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 13 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick details the transition from the "Father" stage (1974 - Justice/Warrior) to the "Son" stage (1975 - Spring King/Dancing Youth)."
